_comment: Curated WHO Global Health Observatory (GHO) indicator fan-out list for health.who_gho_indicators. 'code' is the GHO indicator id used in the OData URL (https://ghoapi.azureedge.net/api/{code}). GHO SpatialDim is ISO alpha-3 for COUNTRY rows. Keep curated (health analogs of the U.S. openFDA/clinical tables) — do not fan out over the full ~2,000-indicator GHO catalog. Indicator ids are PENDING LIVE VERIFICATION against https://ghoapi.azureedge.net/api/Indicator.

indicators.name: Age-standardized prevalence of current tobacco use (%)
